translations.text: Now he is not the God of the dead, but of the living, for all are alive to him.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Some of the scribes answered, “Teacher, you speak well.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They didn’t dare to ask him any more questions.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He said to them, “Why do they say that the Christ is David’s son?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: David himself says in the book of Psalms,  ‘The Lord said to my Lord,  “Sit at my right hand,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: until I make your enemies the footstool of your feet.”’

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “David therefore calls him Lord, so how is he his son?”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: In the hearing of all the people, he said to his disciples,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “Beware of the scribes, who like to walk in long robes, and love greetings in the marketplaces, the best seats in the synagogues, and the best places at feasts;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who devour widows’ houses, and for a pretense make long prayers: these will receive greater condemnation.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He looked up, and saw the rich people who were putting their gifts into the treasury.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He saw a certain poor widow casting in two small brass coins.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He said, “Truly I tell you, this poor widow put in more than all of them,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: for all these put in gifts for God from their abundance, but she, out of her poverty, put in all that she had to live on.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: As some were talking about the temple and how it was decorated with beautiful stones and gifts, he said,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “As for these things which you see, the days will come, in which there will not be left here one stone on another that will not be thrown down.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They asked him, “Teacher, so when will these things be? What is the sign that these things are about to happen?”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He said, “Watch out that you don’t get led astray, for many will come in my name, saying, ‘I am he ,’ and, ‘The time is at hand.’ Therefore don’t follow them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When you hear of wars and disturbances, don’t be terrified, for these things must happen first, but the end won’t come immediately.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then he said to them, “Nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: There will be great earthquakes, famines, and plagues in various places. There will be terrors and great signs from heaven.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But before all these things, they will lay their hands on you and will persecute you, delivering you up to synagogues and prisons, bringing you before kings and governors for my name’s sake.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It will turn out as a testimony for you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Settle it therefore in your hearts not to meditate beforehand how to answer,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: for I will give you a mouth and wisdom which all your adversaries will not be able to withstand or to contradict.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You will be handed over even by parents, brothers, relatives, and friends. They will cause some of you to be put to death.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You will be hated by all men for my name’s sake.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: And not a hair of your head will perish.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “By your endurance you will win your lives.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “But when you see Jerusalem surrounded by armies, then know that its desolation is at hand.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then let those who are in Judea flee to the mountains. Let those who are in the middle of her depart. Let those who are in the country not enter therein.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For these are days of vengeance, that all things which are written may be fulfilled.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Woe to those who are pregnant and to those who nurse infants in those days! For there will be great distress in the land, and wrath to this people.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They will fall by the edge of the sword, and will be led captive into all the nations. Jerusalem will be trampled down by the Gentiles, until the times of the Gentiles are fulfilled.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: There will be signs in the sun, moon, and stars; and on the earth anxiety of nations, in perplexity for the roaring of the sea and the waves;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: men fainting for fear, and for expectation of the things which are coming on the world: for the powers of the heavens will be shaken.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then they will see the Son of Man coming in a cloud with power and great glory.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But when these things begin to happen, look up, and lift up your heads, because your redemption is near.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He told them a parable. “See the fig tree, and all the trees.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When they are already budding, you see it and know by your own selves that the summer is already near.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Even so you also, when you see these things happening, know that God’s Kingdom is near.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Most certainly I tell you, this generation will not pass away until all things are accomplished.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Heaven and earth will pass away, but my words will by no means pass away.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “So be careful, or your hearts will be loaded down with carousing, drunkenness, and cares of this life, and that day will come on you suddenly.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For it will come like a snare on all those who dwell on the surface of all the earth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Therefore be watchful all the time, praying that you may be counted worthy to escape all these things that will happen, and to stand before the Son of Man.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Every day Jesus was teaching in the temple, and every night he would go out and spend the night on the mountain that is called Olivet.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: All the people came early in the morning to him in the temple to hear him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Now the feast of unleavened bread, which is called the Passover, was approaching.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The chief priests and the scribes sought how they might put him to death, for they feared the people.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Satan entered into Judas, who was also called Iscariot, who was counted with the twelve.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He went away, and talked with the chief priests and captains about how he might deliver him to them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They were glad, and agreed to give him money.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He consented, and sought an opportunity to deliver him to them in the absence of the multitude.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The day of unleavened bread came, on which the Passover must be sacrificed.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He sent Peter and John, saying, “Go and prepare the Passover for us, that we may eat.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They said to him, “Where do you want us to prepare?”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He said to them, “Behold, when you have entered into the city, a man carrying a pitcher of water will meet you. Follow him into the house which he enters.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Tell the master of the house, ‘The Teacher says to you, “Where is the guest room, where I may eat the Passover with my disciples?”’

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He will show you a large, furnished upper room. Make preparations there.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They went, found things as he had told them, and they prepared the Passover.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When the hour had come, he sat down with the twelve apostles.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He said to them, “I have earnestly desired to eat this Passover with you before I suffer,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: for I tell you, I will no longer by any means eat of it until it is fulfilled in God’s Kingdom.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He received a cup, and when he had given thanks, he said, “Take this, and share it among yourselves,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: for I tell you, I will not drink at all again from the fruit of the vine, until God’s Kingdom comes.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He took bread, and when he had given thanks, he broke it, and gave to them, saying, “This is my body which is given for you. Do this in memory of me.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Likewise, he took the cup after supper, saying, “This cup is the new covenant in my blood, which is poured out for you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But behold, the hand of him who betrays me is with me on the table.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The Son of Man indeed goes, as it has been determined, but woe to that man through whom he is betrayed!”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They began to question among themselves, which of them it was who would do this thing.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: There arose also a contention among them, which of them was considered to be greatest.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He said to them, “The kings of the nations lord it over them, and those who have authority over them are called ‘benefactors.’

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But not so with you. But one who is the greater among you, let him become as the younger, and one who is governing, as one who serves.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For who is greater, one who sits at the table, or one who serves? Isn’t it he who sits at the table? But I am among you as one who serves.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But you are those who have continued with me in my trials.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I confer on you a kingdom, even as my Father conferred on me,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: that you may eat and drink at my table in my Kingdom. You will sit on thrones, judging the twelve tribes of Israel.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The Lord said, “Simon, Simon, behold, Satan asked to have you, that he might sift you as wheat,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: but I prayed for you, that your faith wouldn’t fail. You, when once you have turned again, establish your brothers.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He said to him, “Lord, I am ready to go with you both to prison and to death!”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He said, “I tell you, Peter, the rooster will by no means crow today until you deny that you know me three times.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He said to them, “When I sent you out without purse, and wallet, and shoes, did you lack anything?” They said, “Nothing.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then he said to them, “But now, whoever has a purse, let him take it, and likewise a wallet. Whoever has none, let him sell his cloak, and buy a sword.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For I tell you that this which is written must still be fulfilled in me: ‘He was counted with transgressors.’  For that which concerns me has an end.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They said, “Lord, behold, here are two swords.” He said to them, “That is enough.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He came out, and went, as his custom was, to the Mount of Olives. His disciples also followed him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When he was at the place, he said to them, “Pray that you don’t enter into temptation.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He was withdrawn from them about a stone’s throw, and he knelt down and prayed,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: saying, “Father, if you are willing, remove this cup from me. Nevertheless, not my will, but yours, be done.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: An angel from heaven appeared to him, strengthening him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Being in agony he prayed more earnestly. His sweat became like great drops of blood falling down on the ground.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When he rose up from his prayer, he came to the disciples, and found them sleeping because of grief,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and said to them, “Why do you sleep? Rise and pray that you may not enter into temptation.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: While he was still speaking, behold, a multitude, and he who was called Judas, one of the twelve, was leading them. He came near to Jesus to kiss him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But Jesus said to him, “Judas, do you betray the Son of Man with a kiss?”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When those who were around him saw what was about to happen, they said to him, “Lord, shall we strike with the sword?”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A certain one of them struck the servant of the high priest, and cut off his right ear.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But Jesus answered, “Let me at least do this” — and he touched his ear, and healed him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Jesus said to the chief priests, captains of the temple, and elders, who had come against him, “Have you come out as against a robber, with swords and clubs?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When I was with you in the temple daily, you didn’t stretch out your hands against me. But this is your hour, and the power of darkness.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They seized him, and led him away, and brought him into the high priest’s house. But Peter followed from a distance.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When they had kindled a fire in the middle of the courtyard, and had sat down together, Peter sat among them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A certain servant girl saw him as he sat in the light, and looking intently at him, said, “This man also was with him.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He denied Jesus, saying, “Woman, I don’t know him.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: After a little while someone else saw him, and said, “You also are one of them!” But Peter answered, “Man, I am not!”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: After about one hour passed, another confidently affirmed, saying, “Truly this man also was with him, for he is a Galilean!”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But Peter said, “Man, I don’t know what you are talking about!” Immediately, while he was still speaking, a rooster crowed.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The Lord turned, and looked at Peter. Then Peter remembered the Lord’s word, how he said to him, “Before the rooster crows you will deny me three times.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He went out, and wept bitterly.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The men who held Jesus mocked him and beat him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Having blindfolded him, they struck him on the face and asked him, “Prophesy! Who is the one who struck you?”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They spoke many other things against him, insulting him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: As soon as it was day, the assembly of the elders of the people was gathered together, both chief priests and scribes, and they led him away into their council, saying,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “If you are the Christ, tell us.” But he said to them, “If I tell you, you won’t believe,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and if I ask, you will in no way answer me or let me go.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: From now on, the Son of Man will be seated at the right hand of the power of God.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They all said, “Are you then the Son of God?” He said to them, “You say it, because I am.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They said, “Why do we need any more witness? For we ourselves have heard from his own mouth!”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The whole company of them rose up and brought him before Pilate.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They began to accuse him, saying, “We found this man perverting the nation, forbidding paying taxes to Caesar, and saying that he himself is Christ, a king.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Pilate asked him, “Are you the King of the Jews?” He answered him, “So you say.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Pilate said to the chief priests and the multitudes, “I find no basis for a charge against this man.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But they insisted, saying, “He stirs up the people, teaching throughout all Judea, beginning from Galilee even to this place.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But when Pilate heard Galilee mentioned, he asked if the man was a Galilean.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When he found out that he was in Herod’s jurisdiction, he sent him to Herod, who was also in Jerusalem during those days.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Now when Herod saw Jesus, he was exceedingly glad, for he had wanted to see him for a long time, because he had heard many things about him. He hoped to see some miracle done by him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He questioned him with many words, but he gave no answers.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The chief priests and the scribes stood, vehemently accusing him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Herod with his soldiers humiliated him and mocked him. Dressing him in luxurious clothing, they sent him back to Pilate.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Herod and Pilate became friends with each other that very day, for before that they were enemies with each other.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Pilate called together the chief priests and the rulers and the people,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and said to them, “You brought this man to me as one that perverts the people, and see, I have examined him before you, and found no basis for a charge against this man concerning those things of which you accuse him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Neither has Herod, for I sent you to him, and see, nothing worthy of death has been done by him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will therefore chastise him and release him.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Now he had to release one prisoner to them at the feast.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But they all cried out together, saying, “Away with this man! Release to us Barabbas!” —

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: one who was thrown into prison for a certain revolt in the city, and for murder.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then Pilate spoke to them again, wanting to release Jesus,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: but they shouted, saying, “Crucify! Crucify him!”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He said to them the third time, “Why? What evil has this man done? I have found no capital crime in him. I will therefore chastise him and release him.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But they were urgent with loud voices, asking that he might be crucified. Their voices and the voices of the chief priests prevailed.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Pilate decreed that what they asked for should be done.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He released him who had been thrown into prison for insurrection and murder, for whom they asked, but he delivered Jesus up to their will.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When they led him away, they grabbed one Simon of Cyrene, coming from the country, and laid on him the cross, to carry it after Jesus.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A great multitude of the people followed him, including women who also mourned and lamented him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But Jesus, turning to them, said, “Daughters of Jerusalem, don’t weep for me, but weep for yourselves and for your children.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For behold, the days are coming in which they will say, ‘Blessed are the barren, the wombs that never bore, and the breasts that never nursed.’

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then they will begin to tell the mountains, ‘Fall on us!’ and tell the hills, ‘Cover us.’

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For if they do these things in the green tree, what will be done in the dry?”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: There were also others, two criminals, led with him to be put to death.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When they came to the place that is called The Skull, they crucified him there with the criminals, one on the right and the other on the left.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Jesus said, “Father, forgive them, for they don’t know what they are doing.” Dividing his garments among them, they cast lots.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The people stood watching. The rulers with them also scoffed at him, saying, “He saved others. Let him save himself, if this is the Christ of God, his chosen one!”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The soldiers also mocked him, coming to him and offering him vinegar,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and saying, “If you are the King of the Jews, save yourself!”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: An inscription was also written over him in letters of Greek, Latin, and Hebrew: “THIS IS THE KING OF THE JEWS.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: One of the criminals who was hanged insulted him, saying, “If you are the Christ, save yourself and us!”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But the other answered, and rebuking him said, “Don’t you even fear God, seeing you are under the same condemnation?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: And we indeed justly, for we receive the due reward for our deeds, but this man has done nothing wrong.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He said to Jesus, “Lord, remember me when you come into your Kingdom.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Jesus said to him, “Assuredly I tell you, today you will be with me in Paradise.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It was now about the sixth hour,  and darkness came over the whole land until the ninth hour.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The sun was darkened, and the veil of the temple was torn in two.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Jesus, crying with a loud voice, said, “Father, into your hands I commit my spirit!” Having said this, he breathed his last.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When the centurion saw what was done, he glorified God, saying, “Certainly this was a righteous man.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: All the multitudes that came together to see this, when they saw the things that were done, returned home beating their breasts.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: All his acquaintances, and the women who followed with him from Galilee, stood at a distance, watching these things.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Behold, a man named Joseph, who was a member of the council, a good and righteous man

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: (he had not consented to their counsel and deed), from Arimathaea, a city of the Jews, who was also waiting for God’s Kingdom:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: this man went to Pilate, and asked for Jesus’ body.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He took it down, and wrapped it in a linen cloth, and laid him in a tomb that was cut in stone, where no one had ever been laid.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It was the day of the Preparation, and the Sabbath was drawing near.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The women, who had come with him out of Galilee, followed after, and saw the tomb, and how his body was laid.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They returned, and prepared spices and ointments. On the Sabbath they rested according to the commandment.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But on the first day of the week, at early dawn, they and some others came to the tomb, bringing the spices which they had prepared.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They found the stone rolled away from the tomb.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They entered in, and didn’t find the Lord Jesus’ body.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: While they were greatly perplexed about this, behold, two men stood by them in dazzling clothing.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Becoming terrified, they bowed their faces down to the earth. They said to them, “Why do you seek the living among the dead?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He isn’t here, but is risen. Remember what he told you when he was still in Galilee,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: saying that the Son of Man must be delivered up into the hands of sinful men, and be crucified, and the third day rise again?”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They remembered his words,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: returned from the tomb, and told all these things to the eleven, and to all the rest.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Now they were Mary Magdalene, Joanna, and Mary the mother of James. The other women with them told these things to the apostles.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: These words seemed to them to be nonsense, and they didn’t believe them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But Peter got up and ran to the tomb. Stooping and looking in, he saw the strips of linen lying by themselves, and he departed to his home, wondering what had happened.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Behold, two of them were going that very day to a village named Emmaus, which was sixty stadia  from Jerusalem.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They talked with each other about all of these things which had happened.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: While they talked and questioned together, Jesus himself came near, and went with them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But their eyes were kept from recognizing him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He said to them, “What are you talking about as you walk, and are sad?”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: One of them, named Cleopas, answered him, “Are you the only stranger in Jerusalem who doesn’t know the things which have happened there in these days?”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He said to them, “What things?” They said to him, “The things concerning Jesus, the Nazarene, who was a prophet mighty in deed and word before God and all the people;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and how the chief priests and our rulers delivered him up to be condemned to death, and crucified him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But we were hoping that it was he who would redeem Israel. Yes, and besides all this, it is now the third day since these things happened.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Also, certain women of our company amazed us, having arrived early at the tomb;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and when they didn’t find his body, they came saying that they had also seen a vision of angels, who said that he was alive.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Some of us went to the tomb, and found it just like the women had said, but they didn’t see him.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He said to them, “Foolish men, and slow of heart to believe in all that the prophets have spoken!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Didn’t the Christ have to suffer these things and to enter into his glory?”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Beginning from Moses and from all the prophets, he explained to them in all the Scriptures the things concerning himself.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They came near to the village, where they were going, and he acted like he would go further.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They urged him, saying, “Stay with us, for it is almost evening, and the day is almost over.” He went in to stay with them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When he had sat down at the table with them, he took the bread and gave thanks. Breaking it, he gave to them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Their eyes were opened, and they recognized him, and he vanished out of their sight.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They said to one another, “Weren’t our hearts burning within us, while he spoke to us along the way, and while he opened the Scriptures to us?”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They rose up that very hour, returned to Jerusalem, and found the eleven gathered together, and those who were with them,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: saying, “The Lord is risen indeed, and has appeared to Simon!”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They related the things that happened along the way, and how he was recognized by them in the breaking of the bread.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: As they said these things, Jesus himself stood among them, and said to them, “Peace be to you.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But they were terrified and filled with fear, and supposed that they had seen a spirit.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He said to them, “Why are you troubled? Why do doubts arise in your hearts?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: See my hands and my feet, that it is truly me. Touch me and see, for a spirit doesn’t have flesh and bones, as you see that I have.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When he had said this, he showed them his hands and his feet.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: While they still didn’t believe for joy, and wondered, he said to them, “Do you have anything here to eat?”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They gave him a piece of a broiled fish and some honeycomb.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He took them, and ate in front of them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He said to them, “This is what I told you, while I was still with you, that all things which are written in the law of Moses, the prophets, and the psalms, concerning me must be fulfilled.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then he opened their minds, that they might understand the Scriptures.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He said to them, “Thus it is written, and thus it was necessary for the Christ to suffer and to rise from the dead the third day,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and that repentance and remission of sins should be preached in his name to all the nations, beginning at Jerusalem.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You are witnesses of these things.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Behold, I send out the promise of my Father on you. But wait in the city of Jerusalem until you are clothed with power from on high.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He led them out as far as Bethany, and he lifted up his hands, and blessed them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: While he blessed them, he withdrew from them, and was carried up into heaven.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They worshiped him, and returned to Jerusalem with great joy,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and were continually in the temple, praising and blessing God. Amen.
